About.title: About Me
About.description1: Backend-focused .NET/C# engineer building and maintaining production APIs and services. I ship features end-to-end, troubleshoot incidents, and improve reliability and performance through incremental changes.
About.description2: Recent work includes external integrations and authentication flows (token/OTP), working with SQL Server/PostgreSQL via EF Core and Dapper. I automate builds and deployments with CI/CD (GitHub Actions + Docker) and take on lead responsibilities when needed: code reviews, standards, and mentoring.

modular.desc: APIs and services ready to operate

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.description: If you're looking for someone to design and build clear, maintainable backend systems in .NET, I'd be happy to talk. You can reach me by email or through LinkedIn.
